decision: Implement Vapi custom-tool webhook before native phone app.
rationale: The hackathon call-in workflow can be demonstrated with the existing Vapi number and local tool server.
The objective assumes camera access is unavailable while other sensors may be available.

decision: Add an offline-only LLM router using local Ollama with an optional Vapi custom-LLM endpoint, kept separate from the deterministic tool layer.
rationale: Satisfies 'processing is offline' while preserving the budget boundary: no OpenAI API key and no paid cloud LLM fallback. External APIs are Vapi now and InsForge later.
